description: Retrieve a list of all available shop categories in LightShop.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of category names; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Look up a shop's unique ID (SID) by its display name in LightShop.

shop_name.description: The display name of the shop to search for.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is the shop's unique ID (SID); on failure (e.g., shop not found), output contains an error message.

description: List all items available in a specific shop in LightShop.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) of the shop whose items to list.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of item details (e.g., name, price, stock); on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Add a specified quantity of an item from a shop to your shopping cart in LightShop.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) where the item is sold.

tid.description: The unique item ID (TID) of the product to add.

cnt.description: The number of units to add to the cart (must be a positive integer).

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the item was added; on failure (e.g., out of stock or invalid item), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific item in a shop in LightShop.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) that sells the item.

tid.description: The unique item ID (TID) of the product to query.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output includes item details such as name, price, description, and stock; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Remove a specific item from your shopping cart in LightShop.

caid.description: The unique cart item ID (CAID) of the item to remove from the cart.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms deletion; on failure (e.g., item not in cart), output contains an error message.

description: Check your current account balance in LightShop.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is your current balance (e.g., in credits or currency); on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Complete the purchase of all items currently in your shopping cart in LightShop.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms successful payment and order placement; on failure (e.g., insufficient balance), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve your transaction history in LightShop, including purchased items and quantities.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of past transactions with item names, quantities, and timestamps; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: List all shops in LightShop that belong to a specific category.

category.description: The shop category to filter by.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of shops in the given category, including their names and IDs; on failure (e.g., invalid category), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve a summary of the current shopping cart in LightShop, including total price and item counts.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output includes cart total, number of items, and list of cart entries; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Search for shops in LightShop by exact or partial name match (case-insensitive).

shop_name.description: The shop name or partial name to search for.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of matching shops with names and IDs; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Perform a fuzzy (approximate) search for shops in LightShop based on shop name.

shop_name.description: The shop name to perform fuzzy matching on (e.g., handles typos or similar spellings).

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a ranked list of potentially matching shops; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Search for items across all shops in LightShop by item name (exact or partial match).

item_name.description: The item name or keyword to search for.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of matching items with shop info, prices, and IDs; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Perform a fuzzy (approximate) search for items across all shops in LightShop by item name.

item_name.description: The item name to perform fuzzy matching on (e.g., tolerant to spelling errors).

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of likely matching items; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Search for items within a specific shop in LightShop by item name (exact or partial match).

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) to search within.

item_name.description: The item name or keyword to search for in the specified shop.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of matching items from that shop; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Perform a fuzzy search for items within a specific shop in LightShop by item name.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) to search within.

item_name.description: The item name to perform fuzzy matching on inside the specified shop.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of likely matching items from that shop; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific transaction in LightShop.

trid.description: The unique transaction ID (TRID) to look up.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output includes items purchased, total amount, timestamp, and status; on failure (e.g., invalid TRID), output contains an error message.

description: Delete a specific transaction record from your transaction history in LightShop.

trid.description: The unique transaction ID (TRID) of the record to delete.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms deletion; on failure (e.g., transaction not found or not owned by you), output contains an error message.

description: Mark a shop as starred (favorited) in LightShop for quick access.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) to star.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the shop was starred; on failure (e.g., already starred or invalid shop), output contains an error message.

description: Remove a shop from your starred (favorited) list in LightShop.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) to unstar.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the shop was unstarred; on failure (e.g., not previously starred), output contains an error message.

description: Mark a specific item as starred (favorited) in LightShop.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) where the item is sold.

tid.description: The unique item ID (TID) to star.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the item was starred; on failure (e.g., already starred or invalid item), output contains an error message.

description: Remove a specific item from your starred (favorited) list in LightShop.

sid.description: The unique shop ID (SID) where the item is sold.

tid.description: The unique item ID (TID) to unstar.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the item was unstarred; on failure (e.g., not previously starred), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve a list of all shops you have starred (favorited) in LightShop.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of starred shops with names and IDs; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve a list of all items you have starred (favorited) in LightShop.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of starred items with shop info, names, and IDs; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Prompt the user to enter or verify their payment password in LightShop. This step is required before proceeding with checkout.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms that payment authentication is complete and checkout may proceed; on failure (e.g., user cancellation or timeout), output contains an error message.
